case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. DONALD BRADSHAW

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-19-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JEANNETTE BRYANT, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT DONALD BRADSHAW IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE LUBARSKY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR AND WAIVED SERVICE 7-18-18. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
